content.full_text:
February 27, 1992

FPPC
Attn: Legal
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

To Whom It May Concern:

Please provide an opinion on the following questions:

1. Is there a conflict of interest when the spouse of a legislator has a family trust in stocks and the legislator is a member of a committee associated with those stocks?

More definitively: The legislator is a member of the Utilities and Commerce Committee. The spouse has a trust - stocks in San Diego Gas & Electric and Southern California Edison and a bond with the Southern California Power Authority. The legislator has no interest in the trust. The legislator is not a beneficiary of the trust. The beneficiaries of the trust are the legislator's children.

2. Is there a conflict of interest when the legislator's spouse has an IRA which includes stocks in GTE and a mutual fund consisting of public utilities and the legislator is on the Utilities and Commerce Committee?

Should you have any questions regarding any of the questions, please call Yolanda Benson of my staff at 445-2778.

A written opinion from your office would be appreciated as soon as possible. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

MICKEY CONROY

MC:yb
